senses.gloss: taqiyya; dissimulation or concealing of one’s beliefs, opinions, or religion in time of duress or threat of physical or mental injury (a dispensation that allows a Shiite to conceal his faith under threat or persecution)

etymology.text: From تَقَى (taqā, “to fear”), related to وَقَى (waqā, “to guard against”).

entries.root: Quasi tqY: or, accord. to some, tqw
